column1: #mapping_set_description: LLM-generated mappings from the FIX Protocol LinkML schema to the Fluxnova BPM Platform LinkML schema. Coverage focuses on workflow/scenario analogues; FIX communication scenarios and request/response patterns map loosely to BPM process/task elements.

column8: Allocation communication scenarios resemble BPM process definitions.
Network status communication scenarios resemble BPM process definitions.
Request-to-response mapping resembles the BPM task / message-flow pattern.
